Finding: WSD defines 16 types: SourcePosition, TokenKind, Token, ArrowStyle, Direction, Participant, Message, GuardAnnotation, NotePosition, Note, GroupKind, GroupBranch, Group, DiagramElement, Diagram, ParseFailure/Warning/Result
WSD parser produces ParseResult with Diagram root type. Uses mutable ParserState with error recovery and configurable error limits.
StateMachineMetadata is a runtime type with boxed Machine obj, StateHandlerMap, HTTP-oriented closures. Completely separate concern from parse-time AST.
smcat state types: regular, initial, final, parallel, history, deephistory, choice, forkjoin, fork, join, junction, terminate. Transition types: internal, external.
ALPS descriptors have type annotations: safe, unsafe, idempotent. Descriptors can nest. No initial/final state concept. No workflow ordering.
XState defines: states with id/initial/type(final/parallel), transitions via on: handlers, guards via cond, actions arrays, context object, invoke for services.
F# compiler uses trivia pattern for non-semantic AST data (range, comments). Separates essential from incidental. Allows independent extension.
F# DUs support structural equality by default. Record types with only value-type/immutable fields also support structural equality automatically.
48 test cases reference WSD-specific types: ParseResult.Diagram, Participant, Message, Note, Group, DiagramElement, ArrowStyle, Direction. All need mechanical migration.
26 test cases for grouping: alt/opt/loop/par/break/critical/ref with nesting up to 5 levels. GroupKind and GroupBranch types used extensively.
Amundsen onboarding and tic-tac-toe WSD examples with full round-trip verification. Tests guard extraction, arrow styles, grouping, participants.
Lexer produces Token list with SourcePosition on each token. Position tracking is accurate (line/column). Lexer is WSD-specific and stays unchanged.
GuardParser uses SourcePosition and ParseFailure/ParseWarning types from WSD.Types. Must switch to shared types.
Project targets net8.0;net9.0;net10.0. Compile order: Wsd/Types.fs first. Ast/Types.fs must be inserted before Wsd/Types.fs.
